insights: Facsimile signatures are automatic rejects (2/8 rejections, 25%)—avoid printed/reproduced autographs.
Confirmed snipes feature authentic autographs from established products (Topps Tribute, Authentic Images).
Set sales and incomplete lots are not snipes (1/8 rejections explicitly noted missing cards).
Wrong card number, wrong set, and wrong parallel parallel account for 37.5% of rejections (3/8).
Novelty, memorial, or modern reprints flagged as rejects; vintage authentic autos confirmed as snipeable.
Confirmed snipes show >81% delta (real underpricing); rejections lack pricing context or indicate overpriced lots.
Emoji-heavy titles and vague descriptors ('group of noted') correlate with rejections.
Title-to-card mismatch (wrong parallel, wrong year) is a critical rejection signal across 2/8 listings.
